expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Workspace admins need to manage membership without editing the database directly.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add schema for workspace members and audit log",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a schema for workspace members (with roles) and an audit log table to record membership changes.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace members table tracks user, workspace, and role",
        "Audit log table tracks changes",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend action to invite members",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a backend action to invite a member by email and record it in the audit log.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend handles email invitations",
        "Records event in audit log",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add UI form to invite workspace members",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to invite members by email from the workspace settings.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Settings page includes an invite form",
        "Submitting the form invites the member via the backend action",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add backend action to change member roles",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a backend action to update a member's role (viewer, editor, admin) and record it in the audit log.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend handles role updates",
        "Validates roles (viewer, editor, admin)",
        "Records event in audit log",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add UI control to change member roles",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to change a member's role between viewer, editor, and admin in the member list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Member list shows current role",
        "Admins can change the role via a UI control",
        "Role changes are saved via the backend action",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add backend action to revoke access",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a backend action to remove a member from the workspace and record it in the audit log.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend handles member removal",
        "Records event in audit log",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add UI control to revoke workspace access",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to revoke a user's access from the workspace member list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Member list includes a revoke access button",
        "Clicking the button calls the backend to remove the member",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-008",
      "title": "Add UI to review membership audit log",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to see a log of membership changes in the workspace settings.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Settings page includes an audit log section",
        "Shows recent membership changes",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 8,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.
